GEA Westfalia · Auxiliary Equipment

GEA Westfalia OSE 10 Separator

Confirmed OEM spare parts for the GEA Westfalia OSE 10 oil separator (German/English part descriptions).

Parts catalog
How to use this list: Part numbers match OEM service manuals. Use the request button below to ask about availability and pricing. Include the part number, quantity, and delivery port.
Part NumberDescription
2065-1001-000Lower section of frame (Gestellunterteil) – OSE 10-0196-./10
0011-8060-000Spherical plain bearing (Gelenklager) – OSE 10
0026-5841-170Securing ring (Sicherungsring) – OSE 10
0007-1958-750Gasket / seal ring (Dichtring) – OSE 10
2059-3375-000Bearing cover (Lagerdeckel) – OSE 10
0019-6933-300Hex head screw M12 (Sechskantschraube) – OSE 10
2065-1002-000Upper section of frame (Gestelloberteil) – OSE 10
0008-3533-000Rubber-metal bush / vibration damper (Ultra-Buchse) – OSE 10
2065-3060-000Set of drive parts (Satz Antriebsteile) – OSE 10
0005-0868-000Proximity sensor (Naeherungsinitiator) – OSE 10
0019-6105-400Cable sleeve / grommet (Kabeldurchfuehrungstuelle) – OSE 10
0005-4485-930Screw coupling (Verschraubung) – OSE 10
2058-3385-010Centrifugal clutch, complete (Fliehkraftkupplung vollst.) – OSE 10
0026-6011-170Washer / disk (Scheibe) – OSE 10
0026-2418-400Securing ring (Sicherungsring), drive – OSE 10
0007-2566-600Gasket ring (Dichtring), drive – OSE 10
2066-1066-000Protective cap (Schutzkappe) – OSE 10
2058-1089-000Ring (coupling area) – OSE 10
